Document:
# Small Guns
Small Guns are the most common weapons found in the Wasteland. They are reliable, easy to maintain, and ammunition is widely available — making them the go-to choice for most survivors.
## Pistols
Pistols are compact sidearms suitable for close to medium range. They are easy to conceal and quick to draw.
## Revolvers
Revolvers are robust, hard-hitting sidearms. They are slower to reload than pistols but deliver considerably more stopping power.
## Rifles
Rifles are versatile long-arms effective at medium to long range. Standard-issue for many factions.
## Shotguns
Shotguns deal massive damage at close range. Ideal for clearing rooms and dealing with lightly armored threats.
## Submachine Guns
SMGs fire pistol-caliber rounds at high rates of fire. Effective against lightly armored targets in close quarters.
## Snipers
Sniper rifles are precision long-range weapons. They excel at eliminating targets from a distance before they can close in.
